prompt: A cinematic dark fantasy portrait of {argument name="character name" default="a silver-haired dragon queen"} standing in the foreground on blackened volcanic rubble, with an enormous black dragon looming protectively behind her. The woman wears an intricate floor-length black gown with armored detailing on the bodice and shoulders, long fitted sleeves, a high structured collar, and a heavy dark cape trailing to the right. Her hair is {argument name="hair color" default="platinum silver"}, extremely long, loose, and wavy, glowing softly in the firelight. Her face is intentionally obscured and indistinct, with no clear facial features. The dragon fills most of the background, with 2 large outstretched wings framing the scene, dense charcoal scales, many sharp horns and facial spikes, glowing amber eyes, and a massive curved neck arcing above the woman. Set in a ruined medieval city with burned stone towers and crumbling structures on both sides, active fires on the ground, drifting embers, smoke, and a blazing orange sunset sky with stormy clouds. Low-angle heroic composition, epic scale contrast between human and beast, ultra-detailed textures, photorealistic fantasy realism, dramatic rim lighting, fiery orange and black color palette, moody atmosphere, sharp focus on the queen and dragon, blockbuster poster aesthetic. Add the text {argument name="watermark text" default="Pollo.ai"} in clean white sans-serif near the upper right.
translatedPrompt: 一张电影级的暗黑奇幻肖像，{argument name="character name" default="一位银发龙之女王"} 站在前景中黑色的火山碎石上，身后是一条巨大的黑龙在守护着她。这位女性身穿一件精致的拖地黑色礼服，胸部和肩部带有盔甲细节，长袖修身，高领设计，厚重的深色斗篷向右拖曳。她的头发是 {argument name="hair color" default="铂银色"}，极长且呈波浪状散落，在火光中微微发亮。她的面部故意模糊处理，没有清晰的五官。巨龙占据了大部分背景，两只巨大的翅膀向外伸展，构成了画面的框架；它拥有浓密的炭黑色鳞片、许多锋利的角和面部尖刺、发光的琥珀色眼睛，巨大的弯曲脖颈在女性上方拱起。背景设定在一座破败的中世纪城市，两侧是烧焦的石塔和坍塌的建筑，地面上有活跃的火焰、漂浮的余烬、烟雾，以及带有风暴云层的炽热橙色落日天空。低角度英雄式构图，人类与野兽之间的史诗级比例对比，超精细纹理，超写实奇幻风格，戏剧性的轮廓光，火橙色与黑色的配色方案，忧郁的氛围，女王与巨龙聚焦清晰，大片海报美学。在右上角附近添加简洁的白色无衬线字体 {argument name="watermark text" default="Pollo.ai"}。

breakdown.creativeCore: 烈日下的龙之女王：一张超写实的奇幻海报图像，描绘了一位银发女王站在废墟城市中巨型黑龙面前的场景，非常适合电影级书籍封面、宣传艺术或史诗级角色主视觉图。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, cinematic, fantasy]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: rim light]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
